channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped item, 27th June
item.description:
Mattress behind bin shed on Sotherby Drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Sotherby Drive, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 27th June
item.description:
Cheltenham Road, Longlevens. Opposite the old Pearman Briggs Caravans site. Next to dog waste bin: 0273 What3words ///lunge.laminate.fittingly 2 bags of litter plus 1 nitrous oxide cylinder.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Loose ironwork cover in middle of Cirencester Road opposite junction of Bradley Road. Very noisy when vehicles drive over it, which is constantly., 27th June
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 154, Cirencester Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, 27th June
item.description:
Tree outside number 8 Sentinel Way is overgrown, and making it difficult to reverse onto driveway. Also encroaching onto pavement, cutting out a certain amount of daylight into living room. Where the branches encroaching the road side of the tree, it makes it hard to pull out of driveway, as unable to see any potential oncoming traffic.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sentinel Way, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights set up again this morning on the Shurdington Road with absolutely no sign of any works. This is the second weekend in succession!, 27th June
item.description:
By the footpath to the Yarnolds on Shurdington Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bicycle., 27th June
item.description:
There are 2 Sheffield type bike stands on the Prom. One of them has had an abandoned bike locked to it for over 6 months, using up our valuable cycle parking. Location: Nearest bike stands on the Prom. to rear entrance to Regents Arcade.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Promenade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th June
item.description:
Yet more rubbish has arrived.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 27th June
item.description:
Very deep pothole over 100mm and bigger than a dinner plate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: Overgrown verges and overhanging trees, 27th June
item.description:
Vegetation and shrubbery obstructing road. Causing high sided vehicles to dive on edge opposite side of lane with a long drop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is the alley way between Clyde rd and Trent rd, 27th June
item.description:
Path way all in even tree dead roots made pathway uneven and very difficult for walking and mobility scooter as path ins risen by tree ,also floods when raining so more difficult to walk through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Pavement bloked, 27th June
item.description:
Pavement partially blocked by vegetation including shrubbery leaning over pavement at head height. Grass has also overgrown pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
